action.reasoning: Observation: Best 0.4631. RevIN modes worse than last-mode on val. 3 iters left. Analysis: Try tuning ensemble weights more carefully OR try different SEQ_LEN truncation. Actually, let me try fitting ridge with different lambda per channel optimized jointly with last-mode normalization on train+val, scanning more lambdas. Or simpler: try a weighted ensemble using larger seasonal-naive weight at far horizon, ridge at near. But limited time. Let me just try lambda=100 and lambda=500 for the train+val ridge and see if any beat lam=300. Decision: Train ridge_last_tv with lam=100, 500, 1000, then pick best by val (using train-only fit for fair val eval), then retrain on train+val. Actually I already did this. Best was lam=300. Let me just stop - marginal experiments unlikely to beat 0.4631 significantly.
action.done_reason: Best MSE 0.4631 achieved with ridge+ensemble. Remaining experiments showed only marginal gains; further attempts unlikely to improve given 3 iters and ~48min left.
